formulas.label: fd8
formulas.latex: W^{'} \left(B\right) = \underset{C \in B}{\sum} log \left(W_{C}^{'} + 1\right) = \underset{C \in B}{\sum} log \left(1 + \underset{a \in C}{\sum} w_{a}\right) .
